queries.sql: SELECT `t`.*, CASE WHEN t.id_type_operation = 1 THEN 'Dépôt' WHEN t.id_type_operation = 2 THEN 'Retrait' WHEN t.id_type_operation = 3 THEN 'Transfert' ELSE COALESCE(type_op.nom, 'Opération') END AS type_nom FROM `transactions` `t` LEFT JOIN `type_operations` `type_op` ON `type_op`.`id` = `t`.`id_type_operation` WHERE (`t`.`id_expediteur` = 1 OR `t`.`id_destinataire` = 1) ORDER BY `t`.`date_transaction` DESC LIMIT 50

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `t`.*, CASE WHEN t.id_type_operation = 1 THEN 'Dépôt' WHEN t.id_type_operation = 2 THEN 'Retrait' WHEN t.id_type_operation = 3 THEN 'Transfert' ELSE COALESCE(type_op.nom, 'Opération') END AS type_nom FROM `transactions` `t` LEFT JOIN `type_operations` `type_op` ON `type_op`.`id` = `t`.`id_type_operation` WHERE (`t`.`id_expediteur` = 1 OR `t`.`id_destinataire` = 1) ORDER BY `t`.`date_transaction` DESC LIMIT 50
